rulings.Case Title: RICHARD THEODORE LUKA VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Third Amended Notice Of Motion For Protective Order Regarding Plaintiff'S Special Interrogatories (Set Two)
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, December 6, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant The Toro Company¿s motion for protective order regarding plaintiffs¿ special interrogatories (set two) is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: BETTY PETERSON VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Amended Motion And Plaintiffs' Amended Motion To Compel Lockheed Martin Corporation To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Documents At Deposition, Pursuant To Subpoena
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, December 6, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiff¿s amended motion to compel Lockheed Martin Corporation to produce its custodian of records and documents at deposition pursuant to subpoena, and for sanctions: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:30am. Both moving party and opposing party must bring to the hearing a proposed order that rules in that party¿s favor. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT H. WILLIAMS et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Set The Deposition Of Dr. Richard Levy After The Trial Date
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, December 6, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Plaintiffs' motion to set the deposition of Dr. Richard Levy after the trial date: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:30am. Both moving party and opposing party must bring to the hearing a proposed order that rules in that party's favor. = (503/TLJ)
